untranslatable_reason: This signal requires bivariate analysis (correlation between two assets, relative IV mispricing, IV spread measurement across correlated markets) and multi-leg options construction logic that cannot be expressed using single-asset technical indicators. The allowed indicators set contains only single-asset price/volume metrics and does not include: (1) cross-asset correlation metrics, (2) implied volatility (IV) data, (3) IV spread/term structure analysis, (4) multi-leg position sizing logic, or (5) options Greeks. The signal fundamentally requires an intermarket options framework rather than single-market price action rules.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_158_0 describes a volatility arbitrage strategy between two correlated assets using options. This is a quantitative portfolio/derivatives strategy requiring: correlation_minimum threshold, iv_spread measurement in standard deviations, delta-neutral sizing ratios, and options-specific metrics (ATM straddles/strangles). None of these can be constructed from the allowed single-asset indicator set. Backtest engine would need IV curves, correlation matrix, and multi-leg options portfolio management capabilities.
